title: Do Google engineers actually vibe code?
summary: Alberta Tech discusses whether Google engineers adopt "vibe coding" (code generation via LLMs) and compares approaches at Google to OpenAI Codex and Claude Code. The video examines current and projected future adoption of code generation at Google across 2024-2026.
